# Full-Time Hustler

> From Side-Hustle to Full-Time Success. Practical guide for entrepreneurs,
> indie hackers, and solopreneurs building businesses with AI and bootstrapped capital.

## Author

Jason Feimster — entrepreneur, content creator, and AI tools practitioner.
LinkedIn: https://www.linkedin.com/in/jason-vc/
YouTube: https://www.youtube.com/c/jasonfeimster

## Content Focus

- AI tools for entrepreneurs and solopreneurs
- Side hustle to full-time business strategy
- Business funding, loans, and capital for startups
- No-code and vibe coding for non-technical founders
- Real estate investing and personal finance

## Key Articles

- https://fthustler.wordpress.com/2026/03/26/claude-can-now-control-your-entire-computer/
- https://fthustler.wordpress.com/2026/01/27/boring-apps-real-money/
- https://fthustler.wordpress.com/2025/05/12/vibe-coding/
